x_snc_devtools_technical_debt.description: The UI action "Save" and the deactivated business rule "sysrule_view - show hint to set table" are remainders of an old way to help admins creating cross scope sysrule_view records. Once the new feature is confirmed, the code should be removed.
x_snc_devtools_technical_debt.short_description: Old code to help admins creating cross-scope sysrule_view records
x_snc_devtools_technical_debt.sys_name: Old code to help admins creating cross-scope sysrule_view records

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_devtools_technical_debt_81dda8651bcab1506c17fdd49b4bcbb4
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_devtools_technical_debt"> <x_snc_devtools_technical_debt action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <description>The UI action "Save" and the deactivated business rule "sysrule_view - show hint to set table" are remainders of an old way to help admins creating cross scope sysrule_view records. Once the new feature is confirmed, the code should be removed.</description> <id/> <related_backlog_item_url/> <short_description>Old code to help admins creating cross-scope sysrule_view records</short_description> <switch>false</switch> <sys_class_name>x_snc_devtools_technical_debt</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2023-10-22 13:34:58</sys_created_on> <sys_id>81dda8651bcab1506c17fdd49b4bcbb4</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Old code to help admins creating cross-scope sysrule_view records</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="DevTools WORK IN PROGRESS" source="x_snc_devtools">d689f6901bd38450a89720a8ec4bcbfd</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="DevTools WORK IN PROGRESS">d689f6901bd38450a89720a8ec4bcbfd</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>x_snc_devtools_technical_debt_81dda8651bcab1506c17fdd49b4bcbb4</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-08-07 16:24:51</sys_updated_on> <type>code_obsolete</type> </x_snc_devtools_technical_debt> </record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: Old code to help admins creating cross-scope sysrule_view records

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Old code to help admins creating cross-scope sysrule_view records
